title: Add static text block as a separator for a group of questions
excerpt:
Request 
Please create a static text field where the user can highlight copy and set as either Title or paragraph text as a segway to the next set of questions. This new text field will not have form automations applied,…

posts.author: Meals (Amelia Edwards)
posts.cookedHtml:
Request

Please create a static text field where the user can highlight copy and set as either Title or paragraph text as a segway to the next set of questions. This new text field will not have form automations applied, and if we nestle questions within, to be allowed to change the internal numbering too?

Currently, I have had to use a workaround as a temporary solution to the lack of a static text block within the form I’ve built for course survey.

The question I’ve built as a Single select question: How would you rate the below course elements?

monday01580×290 11.8 KB

Then nestled several Rating questions within this single select question as a follow on, which is only revealed when the user is forced to click the drop down of the root question (required).

monday02598×813 35.5 KB

This is bad user experience because we can’t be transparent to leaner that there are more questions. As each Rating has it’s own purpose, I cannot make the first Rating question as the segway to this set of linked questions. It requires a text block.

Could we have a text block, that allows us to nestle follow on questions within, without it being a question type itself, and allow us to change the numbering for nestled questions? Below is the idea for how it might look.

Static text field, with nestled questions indented and the numbering is changed.

image565×783 32.8 KB

Thank you, Amelia
